Auto Renewal.description: Automatically renews subscriptions or memberships without requiring fresh user consent.
examples: subscription renews automatically unless cancelled
membership renews every year automatically
billing recurs monthly without further notice

Data Sharing.description: Allows personal information to be shared with external parties, creating privacy and security risks.
examples: we may share your personal data with third parties
user information may be disclosed to partners
your data can be transferred to advertisers

Termination Rights.description: Gives the company broad authority to suspend or terminate accounts without warning.
examples: we may terminate your account at any time
services may be discontinued without notice
access can be revoked at sole discretion

Hidden Charges.description: Permits unexpected fees or pricing changes that may financially impact users.
examples: additional fees may apply without prior notice
service charges can be modified at any time
pricing may change without user consent

Liability Waiver.description: Limits or removes the company’s responsibility for damages, losses, or legal claims.
examples: we are not responsible for any damages
users waive the right to legal claims
company holds no liability for losses

Forced Arbitration.description: Requires disputes to be resolved privately instead of through courts.
examples: all disputes must be resolved through arbitration
users waive the right to court proceedings
legal disputes shall not be litigated in court

Content Ownership Transfer.description: Transfers ownership or broad usage rights of user-created content to the company.
examples: uploaded content becomes property of the company
users grant perpetual rights to submitted material
platform may reuse your content without compensation

Location Tracking.description: Allows continuous collection or monitoring of a user’s physical location.
examples: application may collect real-time location data
gps information can be monitored continuously
user movements may be tracked for analytics

Behavioral Monitoring.description: Tracks user actions and interactions for profiling or analytics purposes.
examples: usage patterns may be analyzed for profiling
activities within the platform can be monitored
interaction history may be recorded for insights

Third-Party Cookies.description: Permits external services to track browsing activity using cookies or similar technologies.
examples: third-party cookies may be stored on your device
advertising partners can track browser activity
external analytics tools may collect browsing behavior

Data Retention.description: Allows the company to retain user data even after account deletion or inactivity.
examples: personal information may be retained after account deletion
records can be stored for legal compliance purposes
deleted data may persist in backup systems

Cross-Border Data Transfer.description: Permits user data to be stored or processed in foreign jurisdictions with different privacy laws.
examples: information may be processed outside your country
user data can be transferred internationally
foreign servers may store personal records

Biometric Data Usage.description: Allows collection or processing of sensitive biometric identifiers such as fingerprints or facial scans.
examples: facial recognition data may be collected
fingerprint information can be stored for authentication
biometric identifiers may be processed by the service

Class Action Waiver.description: Prevents users from joining collective legal actions against the company.
examples: users may not participate in class action lawsuits
claims must be filed individually
collective legal proceedings are prohibited

Payment Method Authorization.description: Allows stored payment methods to be charged automatically under certain conditions.
examples: saved payment methods may be charged automatically
billing information can be stored for future purchases
transactions may proceed using default payment settings

Public Profile Visibility.description: Makes certain user profile information publicly accessible or searchable.
examples: certain profile details may be publicly accessible
usernames and activity can appear in search results
profile information may be visible to other users

Automatic Updates.description: Allows software or service features to change automatically without direct approval.
examples: software updates may be installed automatically
features can be modified without user approval
system patches may be applied in the background

Email Marketing Consent.description: Permits the company to send marketing or promotional communications.
examples: users agree to receive promotional emails
marketing communications may be sent periodically
subscription includes advertising notifications

Feature Removal.description: Allows the company to discontinue or remove platform features without notice.
examples: existing features may be discontinued permanently
tools can be removed without prior notification
certain functions may no longer be supported

Refund Restrictions.description: Limits a user’s ability to recover payments or receive reimbursements.
examples: payments may be non-refundable after processing
refund eligibility can be limited by policy
partial reimbursements may be denied at discretion

Identity Verification.description: Requires users to provide official documents or additional identity proof.
examples: government identification may be requested
accounts can require additional identity confirmation
verification documents may be stored for compliance
